presence_results.note_evidence: His illness declared itself through progressive anemia, which prompted the evaluation
presence_results.rationale: Anemia documented as the initial presenting problem prompting workup.

presence_results.note_evidence: found first a colon polyp and then the malignancy
presence_results.rationale: Colon cancer diagnosed after workup, polyp then malignancy.

presence_results.note_evidence: has declined further disease-directed therapy
presence_results.rationale: Patient declined further cancer treatment for comfort care.

presence_results.note_evidence: ischemic heart disease with documented abnormal findings on diagnostic imaging of the heart and coronary circulation
presence_results.rationale: Directly stated.

presence_results.note_evidence: exertional and stress-related chest tightness a couple of times weekly, reliably relieved within minutes by nitroglycerin spray
presence_results.rationale: Angina with frequency, triggers, and duration documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: intermittent dull, heavy lower abdominal discomfort that does not shout
presence_results.rationale: Dull heavy intermittent low-intensity lower abdominal pain documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: prominent fatigue (his heavy coat)
presence_results.rationale: Fatigue documented as prominent.

presence_results.note_evidence: reduced appetite, and increased daytime napping ... Energy decline consistent with advanced malignancy, cardiac disease, and known anemia
presence_results.rationale: Decreased appetite and napping attributed to cancer, cardiac disease, anemia.
No clopidogrel mentioned in the note.

presence_results.note_evidence: simvastatin 20 mg nightly ... Continue simvastatin 20 mg
presence_results.rationale: Simvastatin 20 mg nightly continued.

presence_results.note_evidence: Continue 24-hr metoprolol succinate 100 mg ER
presence_results.rationale: Long-acting metoprolol 100 mg continued.

presence_results.note_evidence: nitroglycerin 0.4 mg/actuation mucosal spray as needed for chest tightness
presence_results.rationale: Nitroglycerin 0.4 mg spray PRN chest tightness continued.

presence_results.note_evidence: identified with the patient as a first candidate for future deprescribing if pill burden grows
presence_results.rationale: Only simvastatin named as deprescribing candidate; clopidogrel not mentioned.

presence_results.note_evidence: no further laboratory surveillance planned as it would not change comfort-directed management
presence_results.rationale: Routine lab monitoring stopped unless it changes comfort management.

presence_results.note_evidence: Initial patient assessment completed
presence_results.rationale: Initial assessment performed.

presence_results.note_evidence: individualized plan of care developed documenting his goals in his own words
presence_results.rationale: Individualized plan with patient goals developed.

presence_results.note_evidence: elects comfort-focused home hospice care ... Ongoing hospice care visits
presence_results.rationale: Hospice care initiated.

presence_results.note_evidence: Certification procedure completed by the attending physician and hospice physician
presence_results.rationale: Certification by two physicians documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: formal notifications sent to his primary physician and Medicare
presence_results.rationale: Notifications documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: nursing twice weekly to start
presence_results.rationale: Twice weekly nursing documented but no Thursday next visit.

presence_results.note_evidence: aide support offered and declined for now (his choice to revisit)
presence_results.rationale: Aide offered, declined for now.

presence_results.note_evidence: chaplain and social worker available
presence_results.rationale: Chaplain and social worker offered.

presence_results.note_evidence: 24/7 on-call line reviewed — call hospice first, not emergency services
presence_results.rationale: Counseled to call hospice line first.

presence_results.note_evidence: Respite care benefit explained and available
presence_results.rationale: Respite care benefit explained.

presence_results.note_evidence: no hospital transfers, no resuscitation attempts, no machines
presence_results.rationale: DNR/no transport/no machines documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: mornings on the porch, his jazz records, his wife's cooking, quiet
presence_results.rationale: Good-day goals documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: longstanding limited social contact and social isolation which he experiences as contentment rather than distress
presence_results.rationale: Social isolation with contentment documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: married 51 years; wife Margaret is his devoted primary caregiver
presence_results.rationale: Wife of 51 years as primary caregiver documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: wife to keep a simple daily comfort diary (pain, appetite, sleep)
presence_results.rationale: Caregiver comfort diary instructed.
No explicit statement that an H&P note was documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: symptom control is the goal rather than risk modification
presence_results.rationale: Pain and chest tightness addressed but breathlessness and anxiety not managed.
